title: clearSelect: Assertion `p->pWin==0' failed.
poc:
CREATE VIEW x AS WITH x AS(SELECT 0 x) SELECT 'y', x, x FROM x UNION SELECT 'y',
    count() OVER(), x FROM x ORDER BY x;

SELECT x UNION SELECT min(MIN((SELECT x FROM x))) OVER())
FROM x;
description:
yongheng added on 2020-03-16 17:35:20:
POC:
---
CREATE VIEW x AS WITH x AS(SELECT 0 x) SELECT 'y', x, x FROM x UNION SELECT 'y',
    count() OVER(), x FROM x ORDER BY x;
SELECT(SELECT x UNION SELECT min(MIN((SELECT x FROM x))) OVER())
FROM x;
---
It triggers an assertion in debug build of trunk.
key_bug_features: Assertion failure in view creation with UNION SELECT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT name, value FROM test_table WHERE value > 0 UNION SELECT 'default', NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_view WHERE name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) UNION SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
